headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 14, 2026**
article:
The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a thrilling 4-3 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Merrill Kelly earning the win and Paul Sewald securing the save. Ildemaro Vargas led the Diamondbacks' offense with a home run and three RBIs. In other action, the Detroit Tigers edged out the Kansas City Royals 2-1, and the Washington Nationals took down the Pittsburgh Pirates 5-4.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including San Diego Padres right-handed pitcher Nick Pivetta, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation. Other players on the injured list include Tampa Bay Rays right-handed pitcher Ryan Pepiot, New York Mets right-handed pitcher Joey Gerber, Boston Red Sox right-handed pitcher Johan Oviedo, Arizona Diamondbacks catcher Gabriel Moreno, Arizona Diamondbacks first baseman Pavin Smith, Chicago Cubs right-handed pitcher Ethan Roberts, and Chicago White Sox right-handed pitcher Jonathan Cannon.

The Philadelphia Phillies made a roster move ahead of their series opener, trading right-handed pitcher Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money. The Cincinnati Reds traded first baseman Christian Encarnacion-Strand to the Baltimore Orioles for cash, and the Chicago White Sox traded second baseman Lenyn Sosa to the Toronto Blue Jays for outfielder Jordan Rich and Future Considerations.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Edge Orioles in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow win over the Baltimore Orioles, with Merrill Kelly earning the win and Paul Sewald securing the save. Ildemaro Vargas led the Diamondbacks' offense with a home run and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Royals in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Kansas City Royals 2-1, securing a crucial win. Will Vest earned the win with a strong 1.0 IP, striking out 3 batters and allowing no earned runs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Pirates in Thrilling 5-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals took down the Pittsburgh Pirates 5-4, securing a hard-fought win. CJ Abrams led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 2 runs.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall Short in Cincinnati**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants suffered a 1-2 loss to the Cincinnati Reds, with Willy Adames leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 1 RBI. Robbie Ray pitched 5.0 innings, striking out 6 and allowing 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Padres' Pivetta Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Diego Padres right-handed pitcher Nick Pivetta has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to April 13, 2026.

top_news.title: **Phillies Make Roster Move Ahead of Series Opener**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies have traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money.
